default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Scope and plan a joint GrowthX + UpSide dinner event for B2B marketing leaders.](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Event: 50-person dinner at Lamar on June 11, targeting B2B marketing leaders ($10M+ revenue companies)](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Attendees: \~30 GrowthX invitees, \~20 UpSide invitees; mix of customers, pipeline, and select cold prospects](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Next steps: Both teams to share invite lists; GrowthX to create Luma page and add UpSide as co-host](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Format: Cocktails, seated dinner with guided introductions/discussion on growth measurement](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Attendee Profile & Target Companies

  - [Overlap in ICP: B2B companies with sales/marketing teams, $10M+ revenue](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Titles: CMO, VP of Marketing, marketing leaders making investments in growth](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [GrowthX focus: Series A+ with PMF, up to \~1000 employees (e.g., Abnormal, Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [UpSide range: $20-50M, with interest in billion-dollar companies](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Mix: Existing customers, pipeline prospects, select cold leads](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Potential invitees mentioned: TrustRadius CMO, Webflow, Notion](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)

### Venue & Logistics

  - [Lamar confirmed as venue (50-person capacity)](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Date: June 11, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [GrowthX to cover costs (potential $2K contribution from UpSide if needed)](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
  - [GrowthX creating Luma page for RSVPs, will add UpSide as co-host](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Separate invitations: Each company to invite their own contacts](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)

### Event Format

  - [Start with standing cocktails](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Transition to seated dinner \~1.5 hours in](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Guided introductions/discussion at tables (e.g., "How are you measuring growth?")](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Potential for curated seating arrangements (TBD)](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)

### UpSide Product Overview

  - [B2B revenue intelligence/attribution tool](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Features: Channel explorer, deep web page analytics](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Historical data analysis without requiring a pixel](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Potential agency access mode for partners like GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)

## Next Steps

  - [UpSide to send account list to GrowthX by 10 PM today](https://fathom.video/share/iyMn-nk-Q9pNoUCob8br_Pi7eP8xU_TC?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
